product_overview: Warung OS is a web-based operational workspace for small Indonesian shops combining a fast POS, inventory, customer debt ledger, basic reporting, and store settings into a single user-scoped app. The current implementation provides end-to-end flows for authentication, transactions, product management, debts, reports, and workspace reset against a Postgres backend.
core_goals: Provide a fast, touch-friendly POS flow so shop owners can record sales quickly and reliably.
Maintain per-user workspace data (products, transactions, debts, settings) with server-side persistence.
Enable simple inventory management including create, edit, and restock so stock levels reflect sales.
Record and follow up customer debts and allow marking debts as paid.
Offer period-based business summaries (daily/weekly/monthly) and a print preview layout for reporting.

features.name: Account Authentication
features.description: Allow users to create an account, sign in, restore session state, and sign out so each user has an isolated workspace.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Fill owner name, email, and password to create a new account -> Submit the auth form and wait for redirect to /dashboard -> See dashboard and workspace initialized
Navigate to /auth -> Fill email and password to sign in -> Submit the auth form and wait for redirect to /dashboard -> See dashboard with bootstrap data loaded
Navigate to /auth -> Fill email and incorrect password -> Submit the auth form -> See authentication error and remain on /auth
From any authenticated route (for example /dashboard) -> Trigger sign out action -> Session is cleared and user is redirected to /auth

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Provide an operational overview showing omzet, transactions, low stock warnings, and recent debts so users can assess store health at a glance.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Review omzet, transaction count, low stock, and active debt summary cards -> Inspect latest transaction details and recent debt entries -> Navigate to other dashboard pages using the sidebar or mobile sheet menu
Attempt to access /dashboard when not authenticated -> Be redirected to /auth (session required)

features.name: POS Checkout
features.description: Enable quick sale flows: search and filter products, build a cart, choose a payment method, and complete a transaction that updates stock and persists the sale.
user_flows: Navigate to /kasir -> Search products by keyword -> Filter products by category chips -> Add one or more products to the cart -> Adjust line quantities as needed -> Switch payment method to Tunai, QRIS, or Transfer -> Complete checkout -> See success confirmation and updated stock reflected in app state
Navigate to /kasir -> Leave cart empty -> Attempt to complete checkout -> See validation error preventing checkout
Navigate to /kasir -> Add product with quantity exceeding available stock -> Attempt to complete checkout -> See insufficient stock error and transaction is not created

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Allow users to search the product catalog, add new products, edit existing products, and restock items so inventory remains accurate.
user_flows: Navigate to /inventaris -> Search products by name, category, or notes -> Open add-product flow and fill product fields (name, category, buy price, sell price, initial stock, min stock, description) -> Save new product -> See new product appear in the inventory list
Navigate to /inventaris -> Open edit flow for an existing product -> Update product fields -> Save changes -> See updated product data in the list
Navigate to /inventaris -> Open restock flow for an existing product -> Submit a stock increase -> See product stock updated in the list and state
Navigate to /inventaris -> Attempt to create or update a product with missing required fields -> See validation error and product is not created or updated

features.name: Customer Debt Ledger
features.description: Record customer debts (kasbon), filter and search debts, send reminder actions (UI-side) and mark debts as paid so users can track outstanding receivables.
user_flows: Navigate to /buku-hutang -> Search debts by borrower name or WhatsApp number -> Filter debt cards by Semua, Belum lunas, or Lunas -> Open add-debt flow and submit borrower, WhatsApp number, amount, and due date -> See new debt listed under Belum lunas
Navigate to /buku-hutang -> Select an unpaid debt -> Send a reminder -> See lastReminderAt updated and UI feedback (note: reminder is not sent via WhatsApp provider)
Navigate to /buku-hutang -> Select an unpaid debt -> Mark debt as paid -> See debt status updated to Lunas
Navigate to /buku-hutang -> Attempt to submit a new debt with empty or invalid amount -> See validation error and debt is not created

features.name: Reporting Dashboard
features.description: Provide aggregate sales summaries for daily, weekly, and monthly ranges plus a printable-style preview so users can review business performance trends.
user_flows: Navigate to /laporan -> Switch between Harian, Mingguan, and Bulanan tabs -> Review omzet, HPP, pengeluaran, laba kotor, laba bersih, and average ticket cards -> Inspect trend chart and top moving products -> Trigger Preview print and receive placeholder feedback
Navigate to /laporan with no transactions or insufficient data -> See zeroed or minimal metrics and no trend lines where applicable
Navigate to /laporan -> Trigger Cetak PDF export -> See placeholder toast indicating export is not implemented

features.name: Store Settings And Workspace Reset
features.description: Allow users to maintain store identity, owner info, payment methods, and stock alert threshold, and to reset the workspace to initial seeded state.
user_flows: Navigate to /pengaturan -> Edit store name, tagline, city, address, owner name, owner WhatsApp, business notes, enabled payment methods, and stock alert threshold -> Save profile changes -> See persisted settings reflected after reload
Navigate to /pengaturan -> Trigger workspace reset and confirm intent -> Workspace data (transactions, products, debts, expenses, profile) is reset to defaults and app state reloads
Navigate to /pengaturan -> Attempt to save profile with missing required owner name -> See validation error and changes are not saved
Navigate to /pengaturan -> Trigger workspace reset -> Backend returns error -> See failure feedback and workspace remains unchanged

routes.description: Entry route that redirects authenticated users to /dashboard and other users to /auth.
Authentication page for sign in and sign up.
Operational overview with sales, transactions, low stock, and recent debts.
POS screen for searching products, managing cart, and completing checkout.
Inventory management page for adding, editing, and restocking products.
Debt ledger for recording customer debts, reminders, and repayment.
Reporting page with daily, weekly, and monthly summaries plus printable-style preview.
Store profile, payment method, stock alert, and workspace reset settings.

features.name: Account Authentication
features.description: Users can create an account, sign in with email and password, restore session state, and sign out.
user_interactions: Toggle between Masuk and Daftar modes.
Fill email and password to sign in.
Fill owner name, email, and password to create a new account.
Submit the auth form and wait for redirect to /dashboard.
Click Keluar from the account panel to sign out.

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Authenticated users can review key store metrics, recent transactions, low stock warnings, and recent debts.
user_interactions: Open the dashboard after login.
Review omzet, transaction count, low stock, and active debt summary cards.
Inspect latest transaction details and recent debt entries.
Navigate to other dashboard pages using the sidebar or mobile sheet menu.

features.name: POS Checkout
features.description: Cashier flow for filtering products, building a cart, selecting payment method, and storing a completed transaction.
user_interactions: Search products by keyword.
Filter products by category chips.
Tap one or more products to add them to the cart.
Increase, decrease, or remove cart line quantities.
Switch between Tunai, QRIS, and Transfer payment methods.
Click Selesaikan transaksi to complete checkout.

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Users can search inventory, create new products, edit existing products, and restock low inventory items.
user_interactions: Search products by name, category, or notes.
Open Tambah barang and fill in product fields.
Save a new product and confirm it appears in the table.
Open edit action for an existing product and update its fields.
Open restock action for an existing product and submit a stock increase.

features.name: Customer Debt Ledger
features.description: Users can record customer debts, filter debt records, send reminder actions, and mark debts as paid.
user_interactions: Search debts by borrower name or WhatsApp number.
Filter debt cards by Semua, Belum lunas, and Lunas.
Open Tambah kasbon and submit borrower, WhatsApp, amount, and due date.
Click Kirim pengingat for an unpaid debt.
Click the paid action to mark a debt as settled.

features.name: Reporting Dashboard
features.description: Users can inspect computed sales summaries across time ranges and review the printable report layout.
user_interactions: Switch between Harian, Mingguan, and Bulanan tabs.
Review omzet, gross profit, expense, and net profit cards.
Inspect the trend chart and top moving products.
Click Preview print and Cetak PDF actions to trigger placeholder feedback.

features.name: Store Settings And Workspace Reset
features.description: Users can update store identity, owner information, stock alert threshold, enabled payment methods, and reset the workspace.
user_interactions: Edit store name, tagline, city, address, owner details, and business notes.
Change the stock alert threshold.
Toggle enabled payment methods.
Save the profile changes.
Click the workspace reset action to restore initial data.

known_limitations.issue: Report print and PDF export actions are placeholders that only show toast feedback.
known_limitations.impact: Users cannot generate or download a real printable report document yet.

known_limitations.issue: There is no dedicated UI to create or edit expense records even though expense totals appear in reports.
known_limitations.impact: Expense-based report metrics depend on backend-seeded data and cannot be maintained from the app UI.
